pages.raw_text:
Following q request from the board
Of public works, Corporation Counsel
Judson is looking up old ordinances
and old laws to see what right the
Washington Water Power company has
to law double street car track through
the rock cut on North Division street.


Without any ado and acting solely
on its own account, it is declared, the
water power people put a gang of men
In the rock cut yesterday and began the
work of giving that end of town an
extra street car track.


1t took but short time for residents
Of the neighborhood to rise on their
arms and sit up a howl of objection
that reached the city hall. Property
owners pointed out to the city off
cials that Division street is exceptional
~ narrow where it passes through the
sut, and that only recently the sidewalk
IN the west end of the street was toru
mp in order that team traffic, which
b exceptionally heavy, might have more
room.
